edgeCases: use_worktrees=false preserves the single-checkout flow; cmd/centinela/start.go branches only when MaybeProvision returns a non-empty path
Idempotent worktree.Create reuses an existing worktree without rebuilding the branch (covers `centinela start` re-run scenario)
Idempotent SyncIgnores: re-running wizard or migrate adds nothing new to .gitignore/.eslintignore/.prettierignore/.dockerignore/.rgignore or tsconfig.json exclude
tsconfig.json is optional: patchTsconfigExclude is a no-op when the file is missing and tolerates non-JSON content
Hooks running inside .worktrees/<feature>/ resolve workflow state from that worktree only; cross-worktree state is ignored
merge command short-circuits on a dirty main checkout before touching git or invoking the Steward
spec-conflict pre-check runs before git merge so contradictory specs across active worktrees block the merge with both file names surfaced
Merge Steward role lives outside the 5-step workflow — RequiredRoles(step) does not list it; orchestration validator only enforces output rules when evidence is written

ValidateFeatureSlug rejects shell-unsafe and path-traversal feature names (alpha/../beta, alpha;rm, names with /, spaces, uppercase) before they reach git worktree add or the filesystem; called from worktree.Create and defensively from cmd/centinela/start.go and cmd/centinela/merge.go

DetectFeatureFromCwd resolves symlinks via filepath.EvalSymlinks before scanning for the .worktrees/<feature> segment, so symlinked parents (e.g. macOS /tmp -> /private/tmp) do not mask the worktree root
